name: UniPet OpenClaw Connector
description: Mirrors OpenClaw conversation and agent lifecycle events to the local UniPet desktop pet.

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.help: Forward OpenClaw lifecycle events to UniPet.

host.label: UniPet Host
host.help: Local UniPet bridge host. Keep this on 127.0.0.1 for local-first use.

bubbleMode.label: Bubble Mode
bubbleMode.help: Show the first characters of outgoing OpenClaw replies, or turn reply bubbles off.

idleDelayMs.label: Idle Delay
idleDelayMs.help: Milliseconds to keep the final review state visible before clearing the OpenClaw source.

perAgent.label: Per Agent Source
perAgent.help: Use one UniPet source per OpenClaw agent when agent IDs are available.
